author: Circana
title: How purchase data is redefining TV ad performance and driving revenue
description: As TV evolves into a more immersive storefront experience, there are new opportunities for advertisers to open up two-way interactions with consumers. To keep pace with this shift from viewership to commerce, advertisers need modern strategies to navigate the…
